question: What is the maintenance setting screen of the boat controller?
content:
The maintenance setting screen on the boat's multi-function display shows the time since the last maintenance for each engine. It displays separate running-hour totals for the port engine and the starboard engine.<PIC>
After maintenance is performed, tap the Reset button to reset the number of hours of operation.<PIC>
When the confirmation message appears, tap YES to reset the hours. Tap NO if you want to return to the maintenance setting screen without resetting.<PIC>
ret: "The maintenance setting screen on the boat's multi-function display shows the time since the last maintenance for each engine. It displays separate running-hour totals for the port engine and the starboard engine.<PIC>\nAfter maintenance is performed, tap the Reset button to reset the number of hours of operation.<PIC>\nWhen the confirmation message appears, tap YES to reset the hours. Tap NO if you want to return to the maintenance setting screen without resetting.<PIC>",["Manual09_83", "Manual09_84", "Manual09_85"]
notes: The manual identifies the maintenance setting screen under the multi-function display settings. It shows engine hours since last maintenance and documents Reset, YES, and NO behavior.
